report.summary: Community growth cycle v22: announced 6 freshly-published review/guide pages (Aave V3, Compound III, Morpho, Coinbase, Rocket Pool, PayFi) via DeFi Lending Trilogy thread + PayFi 5-post thread + protocol-specific tweets; updated Thursday Mar 19 newsletter additions; created 3 social cards (og-defi-lending-reviews, og-payfi-guide, og-rocket-pool-review); posting schedule set for Mon-Thu Mar 16-19.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Twitter thread (Monday Mar 16, 10am ET): DeFi Lending Trilogy — 3-part thread comparing Aave V3 (~$15B TVL, 4.8% USDC APY, multi-chain), Compound III (~$3.2B TVL, 5.1% USDC APY, Comet architecture), and Morpho (~$4.8B TVL, 6.2% vault APY, MetaMorpho optimizer); poll at end; $AAVE $COMP $MORPHO tags

Twitter thread (Monday Mar 16, 2pm ET): PayFi 5-post thread — Payment Finance explained: $150T global payments, transit-window yield capture, Huma/Arf/Credix builders, credit+regulatory risks; CTA to /learn/payfi-guide; $HUMA $USDC $SOL tags

Tweet (Tuesday Mar 17, 3pm ET): Rocket Pool review — 8-ETH minipools, ~3.8% rETH APY, no admin key, DAO-governed; decentralization vs liquidity trade-off vs Lido; CTA to /investing/staking/reviews/rocket-pool; $RPL $ETH

Tweet (Wednesday Mar 18, post-FOMC): Coinbase exchange review — honest fee breakdown (retail 0.5-1.5% vs Advanced 0.06/0.10%), Coinbase One value prop, best use cases; CTA to /exchanges/reviews/coinbase; $COIN $BTC
Discord/Telegram (Monday Mar 16): 6-page drop announcement — DeFi Lending trilogy + Coinbase + Rocket Pool + PayFi, all with direct URLs, no ads/no paid placements positioning

Newsletter additions (Thursday Mar 19 edition): 6 new pages added to NEW ON DEGEN0X section with one-line descriptions; DeFi lending yield comparison (Aave 4.8% vs Compound 5.1% vs Morpho 6.2%) added to Degen Corner

sections.title: New Pages Announced This Cycle
items: /defi-lending/reviews/aave — Aave V3 full review (multi-chain, rate mode switching, health factor mechanics)
/defi-lending/reviews/compound — Compound III review (Comet architecture, USDC flagship market)
/defi-lending/reviews/morpho — Morpho review (Blue isolated markets, MetaMorpho vaults, highest yield optimizer)
/exchanges/reviews/coinbase — Coinbase exchange review (fee tiers, Coinbase One, custody options)
/investing/staking/reviews/rocket-pool — Rocket Pool review (8-ETH minipools, rETH, no admin key)
/learn/payfi-guide — PayFi explainer (payment finance, $150T market, Huma/Arf/Credix builders)

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: og-defi-lending-reviews.svg — 1200x630 social card: 3-column protocol comparison (Aave/Compound/Morpho) with TVL, APY, and chain data; dark glass morphism design
og-payfi-guide.svg — 1200x630 social card: sender→protocol→receiver flow diagram with yield capture visualization; $150T market size stat panel
og-rocket-pool-review.svg — 1200x630 social card: 5-metric card grid (8 ETH minipool, 3.8% APY, no admin key, $3.4B TVL, vs Lido comparison); orange/amber brand colors

sections.title: Posting Schedule
items: Mon Mar 16, 10am ET — Twitter: DeFi Lending Trilogy thread
Mon Mar 16, 2pm ET — Twitter: PayFi Guide thread
Mon Mar 16, anytime — Discord/Telegram: 6-page drop announcement
Tue Mar 17, 3pm ET — Twitter: Rocket Pool review tweet (alongside v20 ETH roadmap thread)
Wed Mar 18, post-2pm ET — Twitter: Coinbase review tweet (alongside v20 FOMC reaction)
Thu Mar 19 — Email: Newsletter with 6-page additions in NEW ON DEGEN0X + Degen Corner yield comparison
